title: Principal Frontend Developer at Syntel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Syntel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Syntel India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
